violations.text: The food grade paneling in the kitchen area by the 3-door freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2026

A box of frozen waffles was observed thawed in the 3-door reach-in refrigerator. Food items appeared to have black substance/residue on surface. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the 3-door lowboy refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the 2 door lowboy refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Establishment is to obtain a thermometer for the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The employee bathroom had rodent droppings behind the hot water tank. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
A package of crackers was observed with the end gnawed through and product missing. Droppings were found by the product. Product was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils, buckets holding service utensils and pans were observed with an accumulation of food and debris including droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. - Corrective Action - Establishment is to wash rinse and sanitize all food contact surfaces and containers uses to house food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
Chemical container used for storing chemicals was observed with out a label not marked with the common name of the chemical. Chemicals must be labeled. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. Droppings were observed in the laundry room, in the storage room, and in the kitchen. Droppings were observed on food contact surfaces in the kitchen, and product was observed adulterated in the storage room. Droppings were observed under and behind equipment. Including stove - storage racks - washing machine, refrigerator and the pipes in the storage room. Droppings were also observed in the cabinet below the sink. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - See remarks for corrective action New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Plates and crackers were observed stored on the floor in the storage. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The coving under the sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023

The floors in the establishment has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2023

The door to the outside, located in the child care room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. - Management has ordered new weather plates to seal the doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was not operational. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrective Action establishment is to repair the motion sensor on the hand wash sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the kitchen behind equipment, and under shelving in the storage room. The storage room by the hydraulic system had an excess of droppings. Droppings were observed in care rooms, the care room not currently being used had an excess of droppings on floor and in bathroom. Droppings were also observed in hallways, on furniture and in supply and utility rooms. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to have full evaluation for pests conducted by a licensed pest control company. Establishment is to have a full pest control report for Department of Health to Review for 10/30/23. Establishment is to increase pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023
Canned food items were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
The coving under sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023

The floors through out the facility Kitchen, storage room, supply rooms, utility room, care rooms has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective Action - Establishment is to begin immediately cleaning any and all droppings and debris from behind equipment, from all fixtures, and they must clean all floors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
